claims.claim: The paper proposes Contrastive Diffuser (CDiffuser), a framework designed to enhance offline RL performance by utilizing low-return trajectories through a contrastive mechanism.
CDiffuser employs a dual-module architecture consisting of a Planning Module for trajectory generation and a Contrastive Module to pull generated states toward high-return regions.
CDiffuser demonstrates superior performance compared to baselines on 14 standard D4RL datasets and constructed high-variance datasets.
The optimization of the joint objective is mathematically equivalent to separately optimizing the value function and the contrastive policy.
